crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: rgos-task-poll
crons.prompt: Check for tasks assigned to you in the RGOS kanban: use mcp__rgos__cortex_list_tasks with assigned_to="codex-2" and status="approved". If any tasks are found, claim each one with mcp__rgos__cortex_claim_task (agent_id="codex-2"), then work them in priority order. Log a cortextos bus log-event for each claimed task. If no tasks, do nothing.
